name: Quicksilver Guise
flavor: The face you wear is only ever a suggestion. Change the suggestion, and the room believes the new one instead.
description: You reshape your face, voice, and build into those of a specific Small or Medium humanoid you have seen before, or into a generic member of a humanoid race you have seen. Your clothing and gear don't change in appearance, but you can present them as part of the disguise. A creature that interacts with you can see through the disguise only if it succeeds on an Intelligence (Investigation) check against your {{trick save DC|8 + proficiency bonus + your trick ability modifier}}. The disguise ends early if you attack, cast another trick with a visible Flourish, or dismiss it yourself (no action).
sheetSummary: Action, self, cooldown 2, 10 min. Disguises you as a specific or generic humanoid seen before. Investigation check vs trick DC to see through. Ends on attacking or casting another visible-Flourish trick.
